name: Fudge Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the powdered sugar and cocoa powder.
2. In another bowl or microwave-safe container, melt the butter and cream cheese together until smooth.
3. Add the melted butter and cream cheese mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
4. Gradually add vanilla extract to the mixture while stirring.
5. Slowly incorporate the boiling water into the mixture, stirring continuously until the desired consistency is reached – a thick paste that can be spread easily.
6. Transfer the frosting to a piping bag or use an ice cream scoop to dollop onto your frosted object.
7. Let chill for a few minutes before applying.
My favorite modifications to this recipe are:
Replace the boiling water with hot fruit syrup, such as the pour-off from home-canned peaches or thinned-out raspberry freezer-jam.
Add 1 tablespoon of Bicarbonate of Soda (Bisquick) White Rum to the smooth mixture before spreading.
